programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los cuerpos de dos víctimas de asesinato se encuentran en una comunidad de West Virginia, el UAC descubre una disputa latente desde hacía tiempo entre dos familias, y se debe investigar cuál de ellos podría ser responsable de la muerte.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la causa de una misteriosa muerte que involucra a un empleado de armería de NCIS que fue descubierto cuatro meses después del atentado a los campos de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Aún en su licencia médica, Ducky decide re abrir un caso de hace 12 años ordenando la exhumación de un comandante de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el caso de un entrenamiento de helicóptero que termina en desastre en alta mar.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un contramaestre es baleado en una Ferrari y la investigación lleva a que el equipo descubra una conexión con un hombre que Gibbs conoce.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El precio de la justicia
programme.desc: Danny y Báez están decididos a conseguir justicia para una joven traumatizada que fue rehén, a pesar de su resistencia a presentar cargos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las regals de la mafia
programme.desc: Decididos a hacer justicia por el ataque a Gormley, Danny y Frank buscan la ayuda del detective Anthony Abetemarco, quien tiene vínculos con el barrio donde ocurrió el ataque.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Por la comunidad
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony intentan evitar la deportación de la activista comunitaria Coryna Garza (Judy Reyes), quien no es ciudadana, y Frank debe decidir si el NYPD participará en la redada de alto perfil de los Marshals de EE. UU. contra una pandilla local.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man's pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous pursuit between Officers and a known meth dealer ends in an arrest. A suspect with several felony warrants is apprehended without incident. A pursuit involving a stolen motorcycle exceeds speeds of 100mph.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A K-9 unit assists on a motorcycle pursuit turned foot chase gone awry. Officers investigate after noticing the garage door to an auto body shop is open. A pursuit involving a stolen vehicle driving on the wrong side of the freeway ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dispatch the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspect who flees on foot. A suspicious male walking down the street is arrested with a large bag containing stolen goods and drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for backup after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he's caught burglarizing property in the area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers discover a grand theft auto suspect hiding in his apartment. Officers assist the fire department in capturing a brown bear from a palm tree. Officers respond to a shooting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A hit and run call results in the intoxicated suspect being coaxed out of his car at gun-point. Officers respond to a stabbing and the victim is rushed to the hospital by paramedics. Officers give a tour of a newly renovated jail in Maricopa County, AZ.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a suspended license flees a routine traffic stop on foot. Deputies respond to a battered woman after receiving a 911 hang up call. A sting operation nets a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by deputies.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a sting using a decoy vehicle. A man with a knife flees the scene of a dispute with his baby mama. Deputies are dispatched when a man is assaulted with a shovel over twenty dollars.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover a young man strangled to death by hanging ...whose body looks like that of a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team goes behind the scenes at a horror porn film studio to investigate the murder of a slasher film actress murdered on the set of one of her movies.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La nieta de DB Russell fue secuestrada al final de la temporada 12 y ahora él dirige al equipo de CSI en una búsqueda para encontrarla, en el estreno de la temporada 13.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI llega a su restaurante favorito solo para descubrir una espantosa escena del crimen con ocho víctimas muertas y muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una joven es asesinada a tiros en una gran rave en el desierto, el equipo de CSI tiene que buscar pistas, encontrar a su amiga desaparecida y llevar al asesino ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una famosa historiadora de música es asesinada y dejada dentro de un piano, tiene un efecto emocional en Sanders, quien tuvo un pasado con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se culpa a un perro policía por la muerte de su compañero, el equipo de CSI descubre que hay más en el caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las cosas se vuelven personales cuando D.B. Russell se ve envuelto en la investigación de la muerte del entrenador de baloncesto de su hijo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un reverendo que fue asesinado en la tumba del ex CSI Warrick Brown.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran cinco cuerpos en lo que parece ser un área de meteoritos en medio del desierto, CSI Finlay reconoce a una de las víctimas, lo que la lleva a visitar su pasado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI echa una mano a la policía local con varios arrestos hasta que se encuentra a un desconocido muerto en un automóvil. Además, las cosas se vuelven personales para el Capitán Brass cuando descubre algunos datos sobre su hija.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En un accidente aéreo muy cercano a la franja de Las Vegas mueren cinco personas y el equipo de CSI acude para investigar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una destacada presentadora de noticias durante una transmisión en vivo.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Un ranchero se casa con su prima para que sus herederos puedan quedarse con sus propiedades cuando muera. Al no poder quedar en embarazo, su ambiciosa cuñada toma provecho de la situación.

programme.title: El pago

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Paintball
programme.desc: En 1962, la gente de la pequeña ciudad de Hanford, California, perdió la sensación de paz cuando una de las vecinas, Marlene Miller, de 15 años, fue asesinada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Raspando la Superficie
programme.desc: Los científicos forenses trabajan con la única pista recuperada de un tiroteo con múltiples víctimas: una escopeta de calibre 12. Los científicos utilizan métodos únicos para extraer el número de serie del arma y rastrearlo hasta su propietario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Genes delatores
programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de ser admitido en el hospital con una hemorragia inexplicable, Chad Shelton de 11 meses llega a fallecer. Los investigadores y científicos buscan desesperadamente una causa cuando otros de la misma casa se enferman.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesinato en el menú
programme.desc: Cuando el jefe de cocina de un restaurante histórico de Filadelfia fue encontrado muerto, los investigadores entrevistaron a los sospechosos habituales: familiares, amigos y compañeros de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una atractiva joven fue encontrado a una milla de su auto abandonado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que el sospechoso fuera declarado culpable de incendio premeditado y asesinato, mantuvo su inocencia pero fue sentenciado a 25 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Avis Banks y su hijo no nacido fueron brutalmente asesinados. El cuerpo fue descubierto por su prometido Keyon Pittman. La policía se enteró de que Pittman estaba teniendo aventuras con otras mujeres y se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina
programme.desc: Se investiga la aparente sobredosis y suicidio de la esposa del reverendo Bill Guthrie, Sharon, y los detectives recuperan archivos incriminatorios de la computadora de Bill y se enteran de su infidelidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Plato frío
programme.desc: Un hombre murió en su casa después de una larga historia de enfermedad cardíaca. Se asumió que esta fue la causa de su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ellos pensaron que el incendio cubriría su crimen. Pero una pequeña pista, no más grande que una tachuela, permaneció allí. Contenía toda la información que los investigadores necesitaban para poner a un trío de asesinos a sangre fría tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio
programme.desc: Una empleada de una tintorería fue violada y asesinada en la tienda. La policía recurrió a la ciencia forense en busca de las respuestas que necesitaban.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los crímenes más descarados del siglo 20. Adolph Coors III, el ejecutivo de Coors Brewing Company, fue secuestrado y retenido para un rescate.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La pista ardiente
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie anda suelto en Washington, DC. Cada uno de los incendios se inició con el mismo tipo de dispositivo incendiario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 20 de Mayo del 2001, Carrie Nelson fue golpeado hasta su muerte mientras trabajaba en unas oficinas comerciales. El caso quedó sin resolver durante seis años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la respuesta de emergencia de Illinois atendió un incendio en un garaje y se encontró a un hombre aplastado debajo de un camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Aceitoso en la mañana
programme.desc: Cuando la policía recuperó el automóvil sumergido de un hombre al que se denunció su desaparición, esperaban encontrar su cuerpo, pero no estaba allí.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los testigos vieron a una mujer en la parte trasera de un camión, agitando los brazos y gritando. Cuando encontraron una chaqueta cerca de un charco de sangre, supieron que lo que habían visto no había sido un paseo divertido.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: The Mystery of Rome's X Tomb
programme.desc: Dr Michael Scott investigates the secrets of a tomb containing over 2,000 bodies in one of the catacombs of Rome.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: A US law has been passed forcing the return of ethnic artefacts and ancestral remains to native communities.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: In 2000, scientists made a groundbreaking discovery, explaining how birds evolved from dinosaurs. However, a deeper investigation put a question mark over everything.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that he has arrived on Earth the year 2017 A.D. and that he is the exact double of a would-be dictator called Salamander.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is informed by Astrid's boss, Kent, that the world is on the verge of domination by a charismatic scientist and politician named Salamander.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor impersonates his lookalike, would-be dictator Salamander, to penetrate a research station controlled by Salamander's minions.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Giles Kent is revealed to be a traitor, in league with would-be 21st century dictator Salamander; the Doctor infiltrates the dictator's research station.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Traitorous scientist Kent has blown up the research station infiltrated by the Doctor; not long afterward, Salamander, who bears a startling resemblance to the Doctor, makes an appearance.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Having been thwarted in his plans to rule the world, Salamander tries to make a quick getaway by posing as the Doctor. Manning the controls of the TARDIS, Salamander tries to escape.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is forced to use the emergency unit, removing them from time space dimension!

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Zoe, Jamie and the Doctor are transported to a puzzling world where they are confronted by riddles.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and his companions are apparently being tested, but by whom and why?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Zoe have to fight the fabled Medusa and a 21st Century comic strip creation.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to save his companions but instead finds himself imprisoned.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor learns of the discovery of two alien seed pods in the Antarctic.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Krynoid is on the loose in the arctic.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sarah track down the remaining Krynoid pod.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Keeler has been infected by the alien pod and is transforming into a Krynoid.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Krynoid demands that the Doctor be surrendered to it.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives in no man's land during World War I.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor, Jamie and Zoe make their escape in Lady Jennifer's ambulance.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that they are on a planet where soldiers fight never ending wars.

programme.desc: The rebels seize control of the Aliens' HQ.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Caper, a miniature Doberman rescue dog whose never been trained and Julius, a pit bull who is scared of everything.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple fear their border terrier is untrainable; an excitable English bulldog causes trouble for its owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An owner worries that her Doberman suffers from separation anxiety; a yellow lab has a problem with biting.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheelchair-bound owner wants to keep her German shepherd Shep in line; Sasha, the Lhasa apso, must learn who's boss.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a Rottweiler who has suffered a lifetime of abuse adjust to her new life after finally finding a loving home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A terrier rescued via the Internet is a handful to manage and bites anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters; pit bull problems.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A family's German shepherd will only listen to one person; a Brittany spaniel becomes aggressive around female dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A family deals with a stray dog who bites; Daisy Fuentes has trouble controlling her English bulldog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog barks all the time and might pose a threat to children; a beagle mix has lots of strange behaviors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan is called in to help singer Patti LaBelle who is afraid of her own guard dog and a teacher who wants to unify her dog's dual personalities.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix has eccentricities; a Jack Russell terrier attacks motorcycles; a border collie's herding instincts get the best of him.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is too dedicated to its owner; a beagle mix lashes out at anyone who walks past; an Italian mastiff fears cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Italian greyhound mix is possessive over bones and toys; a mastiff misbehaves outside; a Yorkshire terrier takes over her owner's morning routine.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An unpredictably aggressive Kerry blue terrier; two territorial Maltese dogs who are close to being banned from the retirement home where they live; a bloodhound/Catahoula mix who attacks her canine companion.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar visits Tijuana, Mexico, to team up with volunteers from United Hope for Animals, an organization that rescues dogs and finds them U.S. homes; a cocker spaniel taunts her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A golden retriever mix with canine aggression; a bearded collie who barks, howls and scratches at her owner's boyfriend's guitar; a Lhasa apso/Cavalier Kind Charles Spaniel with canine aggression.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close-knit community.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam, and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address, they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: There is a running joke in the posse that every time Bobby Brown asks them for help with a fugitive, he always promises them that it's "an easy one," but the hunts end up being epic searches.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog believes in safety first, and today's hunt puts this philosophy to the test. The fugitive's problem with anger management increases the dangers of their already risky line of work. Dog warns the crew to be ready for anything as they head out.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Blake wait helplessly as the police search for Sarah and Krystina; Adam tips Neal McVane to a stock buyout by Alexis and Dirk Maurier; Nick Kimball celebrates his recent good fortune with a marriage proposal to Dominique.

programme.desc: Krystina and Krystle are reunited, as Sarah is placed under private psychiatric care; Adam confesses his true identity to Blake and Alexis; following a visit to his mother's grave, Adam returns to Dana and pleads for her forgiveness.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake is stunned to learn that Clay may be Ben's son; Jackie's attempt to reunite Dominique and Garrett fails; Sarah accepts her baby's death after witnessing the gravesite; Clay tells Leslie of their possible blood ties.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle is followed by a mysterious stranger, Clay and Ben plan to leave Denver following the inconclusive blood test to determine Clay's real father; Blake and Alexis show their love for Adam by adopting him legally.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Matthew Blaisdel threatens to kill Blake to ensure Krystle's cooperation; Alexis is saved from certain death by a mysterious and handsome stranger, unaware of their family's horrifying experiences.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex is rushed to the hospital while a search party scrambles to locate the missing Carringtons, who are being held captive in a bunkhouse. Fear of the deranged Matthew forces Krystle to pretend that she still has feelings for him.\

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The incident in the bunkhouse leaves Steven emotionally scarred. The police urge him to seek psychiatric help to deal with the trauma. Jeff and Fallon's unexpected homecoming helps everyone to put the tragedy behind them.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven turns down Blake's request to be his campaign manager; Adam is stunned by Dana's inability to bear children; Alexis and Sean Rowan share an intimate afternoon; Blake announces his bid for governor of Colorado, as Alexis plots his downfall.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: The Ricardos are being interviewed for a "day-in-the-life" magazine article on happy married couples. The interviewer arrives at 7 AM just in time to encounter Lucy making breakfast in a frilly lace apron, while Ricky walks in wearing a smoking jacket.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: How long can Ricky Ricardo go, without losing his temper? When Lucy buys a new hat for $49.50, Ricky goes ballistic. To make a point, Lucy bets Ricky the cost of the hat that he'll lose his temper long before her next purchase.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hurt that no one seems to care for his home movies, Ricky declares that he will never show them another feature of his...not even the TV pilot he's creating. Jealous of his project, Lucy enables the help of the Mertzes and creates her own musical western.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky scoffs at his wife and Ethel when they adamantly participate in the hunt for the "Bonus Buck" that will win them prize money from a newspaper contest. Later, Ricky discovers one of the lucky bucks in his own wallet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy desperately wants to accompany her husband on his concert tour of Hawaii, but Ricky can't afford to bring her along. Unsatisfied, Lucy decides she'll win a trip for herself and neighbors, The Mertzes, by entering a television game show contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In an attempt to compete with her wealthy friends, Lucy pledges $500 (that she doesn't have) to charity. Luckily, Ethel spots an ad in Billboard magazine willing to pay $500 to anyone willing to perform a stunt to publicize a new movie, Women From Mars.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to be a published author after hearing about another housewife who made a fortune doing it. Ricky and the Mertzes don't like it when they discover Lucy's book plays too close a resemblance to real life including anecdotes from their own lives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy organizes an orchestra among her girlfriends, but it plays so horribly that she asks her bandleader husband, Ricky, to come to a rehearsal and give them some advice. His direction does little to help.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky becomes interested in a diner that is for sale so the Ricardos and the Mertzes all buy it together. Right away, Ethel and Fred feel they are doing all the work while Lucy and Ricky have all the fun.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to try a new look, despite her husband Ricky's objections. She borrows a black wig from her hairdresser Roberta, who tells Lucy it makes her look like a whole different person. With that in mind, Lucy decides to play a little trick on Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother writes to ask if she and her husband "Xavier" would be so kind as to entertain "a friend's roommate's cousin's middle boy, Ernest" when he visits New York.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Bakugan New Vestroia
programme.desc: Mira and Spectra meet with Prince Hydron, who shows her his collection and later receives a message from his father.

programme.title: Bakugan New Vestroia
programme.desc: Dan and Ace engage in Mira and Gus in a battle against their mechanical Bakugan. During the battle, Mira seems to lose purposely.

programme.title: Bakugan New Vestroia

programme.desc: Dan and Drago are still fighting Spectra and Hellios while Mira, Marucho, and Shun try to free the Bakugan.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: To rescue Kara from the Mortagarian's underwater realm, the Defenders are forced to steal the Tome of Al Mortagar (an ancient book that holds the secret to the original Sigils of power) and exchange it for Kara's freedom.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: When Erik gets arrested for the destruction of the Tome of Al Mortagar, he has to survive in a Di-Gata prison, only to discover that the third icon is hidden within the prison, guarded by a powerful monster.

programme.desc: Erik goes searching for a temple to resurrect Kara only to discover that he must complete three dangerous tasks to get what he wants.

programme.desc: Everett Ray reaches out to Lia with an opportunity that seems too good to be true.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Saddened to see his father distraught over the loss of the Map and his best friend Tormak, Flinx boldly sneaks off to confront Fangar on his own but falls into a clever trap.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: While Izzie faces off against the King of the Creatures in the dream world, the dream chasers keep Izzie's disappearance a secret in the waking world.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Never Witch creates a doppel monster to eliminate the dream chasers once and for all as she casts her master spell to undo the dream world.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Never Witch begins her master spell to reverse the Dream World to it's previous state and the Dream Chasers must race against time to stop her.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation,Z-Blob,follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn,Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real,and in danger!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World,Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau,Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's a mad dash by Buster to retrieve his runaway mustache in this fast-paced, zany city-wide chase. Grizzled and Rooky go undercover to root out the criminal mastermind behind a counterfeit pie operation.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Duke gets a high-tech, smart car. He and the temperamental car chase Ice Cream Truck Bandits. The oblivious Ms. Blumfeld turns into a superhero, stopping crimes around the city, as Duke struggles with his orders to arrest her.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's Harl Hubbs Day and Harl decides to help the whole city but quickly discovers he wasn't prepared for Harl mania! Billy's mother, Ann, accepts a junkyard race challenge against the city's street racing legend, Tread Octane.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: From hang gliding with a Pteranodon to a high-speed game of chicken with a T-Rex, Owen and Claire are determined to deliver the dinosaurs to the new exhibit on time. But park worker Danny Nedermeyer has other plans for our duo ... and Jurassic World!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Simon Masrani has tasked his newly hired assistant, Claire Dearing, to deliver a trio of dinosaurs to Jurassic World's new super-secret exhibit! Unfortunately, Owen Grady, the animal behaviorist Claire hired to deliver the dinosaurs, is late.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerialtram ... and a salivating T-Rex!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Dragons Rising

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: From Wolf Entertainment and executive producer Dick Wolf, the bingeworthy police procedural drama follows ripped-from-the-headline accounts of top New York City detectives and prosecutors in the pursuit of justice. These are their stories.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green learn that a murdered woman was not only a patron of the arts, but that an artist she supported created a painting similar to the crime scene.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives' investigation into the strangulation of an Asian-American stripper leads them to corrupt officers.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives struggle to determine the motive of a club owner who hired two men to kill a stripper.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a comatose woman's husband tried either to commit a mercy killing or to kill her for her money.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Kincaid and McCoy have to decide whether to risk killing a comatose woman to recover the bullet they need as evidence.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A young actress claiming to have been the victim of a white slavery ring becomes the prime suspect when a wealthy Japanese businessman is murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After the body of a wealthy woman is found in the East River, her daughter and her husband become murder suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A safe-deposit-box company eventually exposes a political activist who went underground 20 years earlier to avoid a murder charge.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe, Logan, McCoy and Kincaid try to clear Van Buren's name after she shoots a pair of young men who accost her at an automated teller machine.

programme.desc: A girl found dead in a cooler may have been the victim of parents suffering from an unusual psychological illness.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un día de diversión, aprendizaje y recuerdos inolvidables. Habrá sonrisas, carcajadas y diversión sin fin.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en una emocionante aventura de aprendizaje y exploración. Desde descubrir sabores hasta dominar movimientos de karate, cada aventura está llena de risas, descubrimientos y valiosas lecciones que inspiran la curiosidad.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus divertidas aventuras. Desde paseos en camión hasta misterios con calcetines, zapatos apestosos, magia con helados, rugidos de dinosaurios, la hora de dormir y los superpoderes de mamá: ¡un día de diversión e imaginación!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en las encantadoras melodías que inspiran dulces sueños y sonrisas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels en un viaje especial a través de un día lleno de exploración y aprendizaje. Desde ordenar la casa hasta recordar su infancia, cada momento trae nuevos descubrimientos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras! Desde tomar turnos hasta descubrir el cuerpo, las rutinas antes de dormir, superar enfermedades, la seguridad en la nieve y la diversión en Londres, ¡cada momento trae alegría y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras de aprendizaje! Desde medirse hasta divertirse en la granja, la construcción de formas, revisiones oculares, animales del mundo y sorprender a mamá y papá, ¡es un día de descubrimientos y alegría!

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: How could Lupin and his gang refuse when a church priest asks them to retrieve the Dove's Eggs, the church's jewels, for the sake of Spoonland's children?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A ring called the Star of Alaska holds a single wheat seed inside it. The seed is a new species of wheat that can grow in minus 40 degrees and the CIA and KGB are determined to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Los influencers llegan a la Villa y lo que promete ser el momento ideal para comenzar las vacaciones, se ve interrumpido por la Tablet del Terror.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana amenaza a Frida tras su nuevo romance con Brandon. La Sala Tornado abre sus puertas y eligen a ciegas quién es el próximo EX en llegar. Suavecito sufre por el romance de Kim e Ian.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban y Aylin comienzan un romance. La llegada del nuevo EX sorprende a todos y la Tablet los manda a una cita de tres. La Sala Tornado pone las cartas sobre la mesa. Brandon toma una decisión importante.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La tensión parece calmarse tras la reconciliación entre Diana y Brandon. Camilo y David tienen una plática sincera y Kelly aclara sus intenciones con Karen. Daphne saca su furia y arremte contra Aylin.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Dos nuevos EX llegan a la Villa y se desatan los celos. Diana deja las cosas claras con Brandon en la Love Suite. Todos disfrutan de un día fuera de la Villa y el alcohol les ayuda a encararse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban busca hacer un trío y Aylin busca exclusividad. Llega un nuevo EX y hace que Frida respire de nuevo. Diana esta insegura de Brandon. Kelly es mas territorial con Robbie por culpa de Michelle.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: En medio de una fiesta, Camilo se casa con David en el peor momento y se abre la Sala Tornado desatando nuevos conflictos. Kim va por Ian, mientras que Suavecito llama a no engancharse con sus parejas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Karen y Suavecito se van a una cita y se desatan los celos incontrolables de Kim y se despide de Ian. La peluca María José trae revelaciones importantes y llega un nuevo EX a saldar cuentas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Frida y Brandon se reencuentran y Diana toma cartas en el asunto. Kim y Suavecito se besan apasionadamente pero Ian tiene un As bajo la manga. La llegada de un nuevo Ex y alguien es expulsado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: ¡Celos, arena y mar!
programme.desc: Los influencers más top llegan a Cartagena. Leslie e Isaac se encuentran por primera vez después de conocerse por las redes sociales. Una riña entre Lizbeth y Ana comienza a dividir a los bandos en la villa. El primer ex hace temblar a algunos.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ignoring her father’s warnings, Leanne Mcintyre agrees to defend charismatic philanthropist Gil Stoddard, accused of brutally murdering his business partner.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After a failed attempt to kidnap Matlock’s daughter, the kidnappers take Matlock’s friend instead! Matlock tries to track down his friend, meanwhile, he’s asked to investigate the kidnapping of an eight-year-old boy.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: While Ben is trying to find his friend who was kidnapped, he realizes that an FBI agent is being framed for that crime and more. Now Ben must free the agent from suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: What begins as a simple home burglary evolves into a very strange series of events for professional thief Kevin Gilliam.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The church choir hits a sour note when parishioner Wally McDaniels, is accused of murder. McDanielsturns to fellow choir member Ben Matlock to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Amidst the beauty of a luxurious island mansion, a mystery game for charity quickly evolves into a puzzling murder when Matlock discovers the victim is really dead!

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A budding friendship between two great lawyers blossoms into animosity when Matlock and District Attorney Brennen square off on a murder trial. Not only does Matlock believe in his client’s innocence, he thinks Brennen might be the one who’s guilty!

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Thanks to Matlock, a struggling private investigator, played by guest star George Peppard, reunites with his long-lost daughter! Together they investigate a mysterious trail of clues to solve the toughest murder case of his career.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Family or not, Matlock regrets agreeing to hold a pre-wedding party for his bride-to-be goddaughter. Fights among the many freeloading guests have left his home in shambles and an old family feud has escalated into murder!

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When young attorney Samuel J. Haskins argues his case in court, it's clear he's copying the unusual style of his idol, Ben Matlock. This is flattering until Sam and his girlfriend get tangled up in a blackmail and murder scheme.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Why would anyone confess to a murder they didn’t commit? Ben’s trying to help his reporter friend beat a murder charge, but when she’s caught in a lie even Ben isn’t convinced she’s innocent.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro dukes it out with a hungry Skyshark in the shadow of the Sacrificial Alter. On the other side of Upper Yard, Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp try to survive their visit to an island that wants them dead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp tangle with Satori and his exploding, snake-filled Surprise Clouds. The sky priest may look like a dancing dango, but the impact of his mantra leaves the pirates bloodied and boatless.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Sanji try to regain control of the Crow, and Luffy stirs up a brutal barrage of bursting balls when he attacks Satori. Meanwhile, Chopper whistles for the Sky Knight to avoid becoming a sacrificial reindeer!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper fights bravely to stop Shura from incinerating the Going Merry, but the little reindeer is no match for a sky priest. Gan Fall is on his way, but will the dispossessed deity arrive in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Gan Fall is badly burned during his battle with Shura, Chopper musters the courage for a death-defying leap of faith. Elsewhere, Luffy may have finally discovered a way to defeat Satori!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Shandorians prepare for an all-out attack on their priestly adversaries, Chopper meets the mysterious creatures that saved his life, and Nami makes an astonishing discovery about the origins of Upper Yard.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Shandorians continue their battle for control of Upper Yard, the Straw Hats celebrate their happy reunion by swapping stories over a campfire and feasting on barbequed Skyshark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Laki’s pursuit of precious Vearth causes one of her Shandorian comrades to be injured during the battle with Ohm. As night falls on Upper Yard, the Straw Hats dream of gold while dancing with wolves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The electrifying deity of Skypiea, God Eneru, grants his priests unlimited power in their hunt for the Straw Hats. Usopp has a plan to get the mysteriously-repaired Going Merry back in the water, but it involves using Chopper as bait!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats scatter when their search for gold uncovers a giant python, and Gan Fall reveals the tragic story of Jaya’s arrival in the sky. Meanwhile, Wyper readies the Shandorians for a raid on Eneru’s shrine!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the heartless god of Upper Yard eagerly anticipates the dawning of Sky Warefare, the Shandorian forces are savagely snared by the Ordeal of String, and Luffy wanders into the fight of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro rushes to perfect a deadly technique known as the Flying Blade Attack. The move proves difficult to master, but it could be the key to the swordsman surviving a battle with the Shandorian warrior, Braham.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Usopp are driven to their knees by the electrifying presence of god, Luffy is nearly incinerated by Wyper’s Burn Bazooka, and Nami joins Gan Fall in a fight against two killer clones!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper unleashes the fury of his Rumble Ball during a sticky slugfest with a swap cloud spewing priest of Upper Yard. Can the little reindeer discover his opponent’s lone weakness before it’s too late?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the Knight of the Sky team up to obliterate two bumbling, balloon-shaped bad guys, and God Eneru relies on his astounding invincibility to torment a noble Shandorian warrior.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin’s search for a mystical city of gold is interrupted by Yama, one of Eneru’s faithful servants. When the rampaging warrior destroys some ancient ruins, he provokes the wrath of Robin’s many fists of fury!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Priest Ohm silences Chopper with an attack from which few – if any – ever recover. Meanwhile, Luffy begins to notice something strange about his cave-like prison, and four fearsome warriors prepare for battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Gan Fall, Wyper, Ohm, and a prizefighting pooch gather for a ferocious free-for-all at the site of the Upper Ruins. While the battle rages, Luffy tries to punch his way out of the belly of a poisonous python!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Wyper are out to beat down the same bad guys, but will they realize it soon enough to survive a white-barbed death match of doom? Deep in the belly of the python, Nami and Luffy enjoy what could be a short-lived reunion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eager to end their battle, Zoro aims the awesome destructive power of his 108 Caliber Phoenix at the sinister Priest Ohm! Elsewhere, god demands that Robin help him search for a legendary golden bell.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru begins a deadly rampage aimed at exterminating the heavenly beings of Skypiea, and the ruins of Shandora become the scene of a bloody contest where survival is the name of the game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gan Fall, Wyper, Zoro, and Robin join forces for an attack on God Eneru. Despite their furious onslaught, the four warriors prove powerless to harm the thunderous deity until Wyper utilizes the power of a mystical stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru makes a shocking recovery from wounds that should have ended his reign of terror. Zoro and Wyper muster the strength for one final stand, and Nami must choose between her friends – and survival.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges from his serpentine tomb with one thing on his mind: revenge! As the rubber-man sets out to settle the score with God Eneru, Conis rushes to warn her people of their impending doom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the citizens of the sky run for their lives, Eneru issues in the dawn of Deathpiea! Luffy is determined to stop the madman, but first he must discover a way to lay hands on the heinous holy man!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A handful of gold sends Luffy hurtling towards his death, Sanji and Usopp mount a midair rescue mission, and Nami prepares for an electrifying showdown with God Eneru!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp arrives just in time to save Nami from a lethal thunderbolt, but even their combined powers are no match for Eneru. While they scramble for an escape route, Sanji stealthily searches for a way to sabotage god’s ark!

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: A special crystal allows Jack the Ripper to travel through time and continue his killing spree.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Night Man and Black Knight join forces to stop the murders of government-protected witnesses.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Night Man must prevent Keyes from winning a run for Mayor.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: A serial arsonist hits Chinatown, and Night Man thinks it may have to do with an ancient legend.

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: In search of a legendary abnormal, Magnus and Will become trapped by a cave-in.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A final confrontation looms as the team races to prevent the unleashing of a doomsday weapon.

programme.title: Sanctuary

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware, but after investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: After multiple men are discovered brutally murdered, investigators determine that each victim was last seen with a handsome stranger they met in a bar.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chicago police investigate the murders of several women, whose bodies are discovered in abandoned buildings barefoot.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: El Paso investigators race to track down a ruthless killer who is burying his victims in shallow desert graves, dead or alive.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Investigators in East Baton Rouge, La., hunt for a serial murderer who carefully carves up and cuts the bodies of his victims after death.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Death Note: Justice
programme.desc: Mello busts into SPK headquarters to retrieve a photograph of himself to make sure he won't be killed by Kira.

programme.title: Death Note: Transfer
programme.desc: Near contacts the Japanese task force and determines that Kira is among their members.

programme.title: Death Note: Selection
programme.desc: Star newscaster Kiyomi Takada becomes Kira's spokesperson to the world.

programme.title: Death Note: Scorn
programme.desc: Light pretends to investigate Kiyomi.

programme.title: Death Note: Vigilance
programme.desc: Aizawa figures out what's going on and tells Near, who already knows about the notes.

programme.title: Death Note: Malice
programme.desc: Light gives Kiyomi the order to finish off Near.

programme.title: Death Note: 1.28
programme.desc: Near, along with the SPK, meets Light and the task force at a warehouse for the final showdown.

programme.title: Death Note: New World
programme.desc: Though Mikami has written all the investigators' names in the Death Note, a minute passes and everyone is still alive.

programme.title: Death Note: Assault
programme.desc: As predicted on the tapes sent to Sakura TV, news anchors and commentators who expressed doubt about Kira die one by one.

programme.title: Death Note: Love

programme.title: Death Note: Wager
programme.desc: Evidence turns up that points to Misa Amane as the second Kira.

programme.title: Death Note: Decision
programme.desc: Misa is in confinement, though her memories of the Death Note have been completely wiped away.

programme.title: Death Note: Execution
programme.desc: After fifty days of confinement the killings continue, and Misa and Light are released.

programme.title: Death Note: Ally
programme.desc: Though L is still suspicious, Light and Misa, their memories of being Kira wiped clean, return to headquarters….

programme.title: Death Note: Silence

programme.title: Mr. Osomatsu
